title: Is Brain Fog After 40 Normal? What Causes It and How to Clear It
seo_title: Is Brain Fog After 40 Normal? Causes and Fixes
meta_description: Brain fog after 40 is driven by estrogen fluctuation, CoQ10 decline, and disrupted sleep. Learn why it happens and what science-backed steps actually restore mental clarity.
excerpt: Forgetting words, losing focus, thinking through cotton — brain fog is one of the most common but least discussed symptoms of perimenopause. Here is the biology behind it and what actually helps.
tags: brain fog, CoQ10, cognitive health, perimenopause, memory, women over 40, mental clarity
author: Dr. Daniel Yadegar, MD
product_bridge: Liposomal CoQ10 Brain Tonic, Neuro Creamer
